icon-color.$description: Chevron icon color — same as subtle button icon color

icon-gap.$description: Gap between chevron icon and select text

icon-inset-inline-end.$description: Distance from the inline-end border to the chevron icon (8px)

icon-size.$description: Chevron-down icon size — matches the medium icon size

padding-inline-end-with-icon.$description: Right padding when icon is present: icon-size + gap + inset
